## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Foundation / tooling
- [ ] Data model / migrations
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] AI / agent behaviour
- [ ] Security / privacy
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Documentation

## Product checks

- [ ] Matches the intended user workflow
- [ ] Mobile-first experience is usable
- [ ] Empty, loading, and error states are handled
- [ ] AI-generated changes require confirmation where relevant

## Architecture checks

- [ ] Code follows module boundaries
- [ ] Business logic is not hidden in UI components
- [ ] Database changes include Prisma migration where relevant
- [ ] Tenant isolation is preserved where relevant
- [ ] Azure migration readiness is preserved
- [ ] External provider usage is behind adapters

## Security and privacy checks

- [ ] RBAC/auth implications reviewed
- [ ] Audit logging added where relevant
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Sensitive data handling reviewed
- [ ] Raw audio / transcript retention rules respected where relevant
- [ ] LinkedIn restrictions respected

## Quality checks

- [ ] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass where relevant
- [ ] E2E/mobile tests updated where relevant
- [ ] Production build passes

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] Environment variables documented where relevant
- [ ] Known limitations listed

## Tests run

List the commands run.

## Risks / assumptions

List risks, assumptions, or deferred work.
